---
title: 'Error Handling'
date: '2026-03-05'
engine: knitr
type: slides
execute:
  error: true
  eval: false
categories:
- Week01
format:
  revealjs:
    navigation-mode: vertical
    logo: ../../N.svg
    includes:
      in_header: ../../header.html
---

# More function writing

Dealing with errors: 

- Debugging
- Error handling

Defensive programming:

- Assertions
- unit testing
